## Summary

Describe the user-visible or internal outcome and the intentionally excluded scope.

## Authority and source proof

- [ ] SQLite authority, source references, and derived-cache boundaries remain explicit.
- [ ] No generated summary or external provider output became an unaudited durable fact.

## Verification

List fresh commands and relevant result counts.

## Compatibility

- [ ] Schema/API changes are additive, or the migration and consumer impact are documented.
- [ ] Existing databases and deterministic offline behavior were exercised where relevant.

## Safety

- [ ] No secret, token, database, trace, benchmark payload, cache, or runtime artifact is committed.
- [ ] Optional network/provider paths remain opt-in and are not required by CI.
